PermitPulse Stuck Project Desk

Stuck permit, utility, or property-record issue?

PermitPulse helps ADU builders, remodelers, agents, investors, and homeowners organize messy public records, permit status, utility delays, correction notes, and next-step questions into a clean 48-hour project packet.

Send a stuck project See what's included

Pilot offer this week: 48-hour stuck-project packet - starting at $299.

Public-record review
Source-backed status packet
Items to manually confirm
Next questions to ask
Client-ready PDF summary
Paid service desk

For active project pain, not passive dashboards.

Have an ADU, remodel, rebuild, or property deal stuck in permit review, utility hookup, corrections, or unclear city status? Send the address, permit number, screenshots, or portal notes. I'll organize the public records, map what appears pending, and give you a clean next-step packet you can use with your client, designer, contractor, city, or utility.

Send a stuck project View pricing

✓ Organize the visible public record

✓ Separate known items from manual-confirmation items

✓ Turn portal noise into a source-backed status packet

✓ Give you cleaner questions for the next call or email

What this is for

When the project is already stuck or the record is too messy to explain.

01 / ADU

ADU permit review delays

For projects waiting on review, corrections, or unclear portal movement.

02 / UTILITY

Utility hookup / energization confusion

For unclear agency status, missing follow-ups, and scattered utility notes.

03 / CORRECTIONS

City correction cycles

For correction letters, status notes, and next questions that need structure.

04 / RECORDS

Remodel or rebuild records

For old permits, public attachments, inspection notes, and visible history.

05 / CLIENTS

Client timeline questions

For cleaner updates before a client, owner, contractor, or lender conversation.

06 / DUE DILIGENCE

Property due diligence

Before buying, quoting, listing, or continuing work on uncertain records.

What you send

The messy material you already have.

✓ Address

✓ City / jurisdiction if known

✓ Permit number if available

✓ Screenshots from city or utility portals

✓ Correction letters or status notes

✓ Short description of what feels stuck

What you get

A source-backed status packet for the next conversation.

✓ Public-record source summary

✓ Permit/property timeline

✓ Current visible status

✓ Open questions / manual-confirmation items

✓ Utility / agency follow-up checklist when relevant

✓ Client-ready PDF summary

✓ Clear next-step questions for the city, utility, designer, contractor, or owner

What I do not do

Clear boundaries, stated up front.

PermitPulse is public-record review and documentation support. It does not replace a licensed professional, permit expediter, architect, contractor, attorney, utility representative, or city staff.

NO

Legal advice

NO

Code compliance conclusions

NO

Entitlement guarantees

NO

Architectural or engineering review

NO

Approval promises

NO

Replacement for city staff, licensed professionals, contractors, or permit expediters

Pricing

Start with the 48-hour stuck-project packet.

Pilot pricing while this remains hands-on.

Quick Address Screen

Lightweight first-pass screen only. Best before deciding whether a full packet is needed.

Recurring support

PermitPulse Desk

Custom monthly

For builders, designers, agents, or expediters with recurring projects that need weekly tracking, summaries, and client update support.

Best fit

Built for people who need a clear packet before the next conversation.

✓ ADU builders

✓ Design-build remodelers

✓ Permit expediters needing overflow help

✓ Residential designers / architects

✓ Real estate agents and investors dealing with older homes, rebuilds, ADUs, or uncertain property records

✓ Homeowners who need a clear packet before their next city, utility, or contractor conversation

How it works

Three steps from messy status to clearer next questions.

01 / SEND

Send the address + what's stuck

Include the permit number, portal screenshots, correction notes, or utility notes if you have them.

02 / REVIEW

I review official/public sources and organize the issue

The packet separates visible records from items that need manual confirmation.

03 / PACKET

You receive a clear PDF packet

Status, source notes, public-record risk flags, and next-step questions for the right party.

Contact / intake

Send the stuck project.

Share the address, jurisdiction, permit number if you have it, and what feels stuck. Screenshots can be sent after contact.

This is public-record organization and next-step visibility support. It is not legal, code, entitlement, architectural, engineering, insurance, filing, or agency advice.

Uploads are not attached here. Screenshots, portal notes, and correction letters can be sent after contact.
